title: How to Find a Good App Design Company
excerpt: The right app design company can be the difference between an app that thrives in the app store and one that gets deleted after the first use. This guide walks you through how to find, evaluate, and choose an app design company that truly delivers.
content:
Building a mobile app is a significant investment — and finding the right design company to partner with is one of the most important decisions you'll make. Here's how to do it right.

Know What You're Looking For

Not all app design companies are the same. Some specialize in consumer apps, others in enterprise software. Some focus purely on design; others handle design and development end-to-end. Before you start searching, clarify:

  • Do you need just design, or design and development?
  • What platform are you targeting (iOS, Android, both)?
  • What's your approximate budget?
  • What stage are you at (idea, wireframe, existing app needing a redesign)?

Check Their App Portfolio Thoroughly

Ask to see apps they've designed that are live in the App Store or Google Play. Download them. Use them. Does the UX feel intuitive? Is the visual design polished? Does it perform well?

Screenshots in a portfolio are easy to fake. Live, working apps are not.

Look for UX-First Thinking

The best app design companies lead with user experience, not aesthetics. They talk about user flows, onboarding friction, retention patterns, and conversion. If an agency talks only about making your app "look beautiful," dig deeper.

Assess Their Discovery Process

A great agency will invest time understanding your users, your business goals, and the competitive landscape before they design a single screen. If they skip straight to mockups, that's a warning sign.

Ask About Their Handoff Process

If you have a separate development team, how does the design company prepare and transfer files? Do they provide design systems, component libraries, and developer specs?

Partner With Experts

Bluewaves Technology designs and develops apps that users genuinely enjoy using. Our UX-first approach, paired with stunning visual design and rock-solid development, gives our clients apps that perform in the real world.
